scope: Long View Sprite/Floor Budget Safe: render-time only; no worldgen/assets/rain/roof geometry changes.
interventions: Added V260 constants and build id.
Added Long View Governor per-frame using previous drawStats: spriteCandidates, spriteStripes, floorSegments, drawWorldMs, weather/zone.
Added sprite candidate prefilter for far tiny decorative details only.
Added sprite screen-size LOD decision with protected sprite guard.
Added stripe-step LOD for far/mid sprites, extending V147 rather than replacing it.
Added far-floor band-height budget for long-view frames only, preserving near band and floor maps.
Added V260 summary/download/toggle commands and recorder fields.
knownLimitations: Browser visual test still required for popping, far sprite poverty, floor banding, pergola storm, pineta/fascia_palme visual long views.
Floor segment saved estimate is approximate because V260 changes row banding, not map/fMap itself.
recommendedManualMarkers: erba visuale lunga X65 Y25 storm
